title: Trump wants Strait of Hormuz open 'without limitation, including tolls' during Iran ceasefire: White House
summary_full: Iran is reportedly planning to demand that shipping firms pay tolls in cryptocurrency to let their oil tankers through the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: Iran is reportedly planning to demand that shipping firms pay tolls in cryptocurrency to let their oil tankers through the Strait of Hormuz.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Iran is reportedly planning to demand that shipping firms pay tolls
